ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., east south central) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the region */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the region */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the region */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Current unemployment rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Alabama) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the state belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the state */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" TEXT /* Current unemployment rate in the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each labor statistics record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state for which the statistics apply */,
  "displaced_workers" INTEGER /* Number of displaced workers in the state */,
  "reemployed" INTEGER /* Number of workers who have been reemployed */,
  "unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed individuals */,
  "not_in_labor_force" INTEGER /* Number of individuals not in the labor force */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "total_employment" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "employment_rate" TEXT /* Employment rate in the state */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" TEXT /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "average_duration_unemployment" TEXT /* Average duration of unemployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_labor_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment program */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the unemployment program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program and its benefits */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the program */,
  "number_of_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who have benefited from the program */,
  "success_rate" TEXT /* Success rate of the program in terms of reemployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_programs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state offering the training */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training (e.g., 6 weeks) */,
  "eligibility" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for participants */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "cost_per_participant" TEXT /* Cost per participant for the training */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the training program */,
  "success_rate" TEXT /* Success rate of the training program in terms of reemployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment agency */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the agency operates */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the employment agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employment agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the employment agency */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members in the agency */,
  "number_of_clients_served" INTEGER /* Number of clients served by the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_agencies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user (e.g., view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access attempt was successful */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
